name: Void Liberation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>煉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>乖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>放</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Reveal 1 "Shaddoll" card in your hand; add 2 "Shaddoll" cards from your Deck to your hand of different types (Monster, Spell, or Trap) from the revealed card and each other, then discard 1 card. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Infernoid" monster from your Deck or GY your hand. You can only use each effect of "Void Liberation" once per turn.
eff: Reveal 1 "Shaddoll" card in your hand; add 2 "Shaddoll" cards from your Deck to your hand of different types (Monster, Spell, or Trap) from the revealed card and each other, then discard 1 card. You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Infernoid" monster from your Deck or GY your hand. You can only use each effect of "Void Liberation" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
